uplink.description: warm field reading: 3.7 V, 23.4 C, 60.0 %RH, 600 s interval
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (field1=battery V, field2=humidity %, field3=temp C, field4=interval) and re-keying to the normalized vocabulary.

uplink.description: sub-zero reading exercises two's-complement temperature: 3.0 V, -5.0 C, 80.0 %RH, 1200 s interval
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js and re-keying to the normalized vocabulary. bytes[6..7]=0xFFCE decodes via two's complement to -50 deci-C = -5.0 C.
Synthetic input with bytes[3]=0; upstream returns {Significant:'data invalid'}, our codec returns an error per the output contract.
